2072178634081894597.full_text: Graeme Swann Said :  “It's hard to prepare for a player like Vaibhav Sooryavanshi. He is still new to international cricket, but he has already played two IPL seasons. That means there is video footage available. Some of the England bowlers may have bowled to him in the IPL,”  [Jiostar]

2072166914990960875.full_text:
🚨 Team India Update for First T20I vs England 🚨

> Vaibhav Sooryavanshi will not make his debut.
> Sanju Samson and Abhishek Sharma are likely to open.
> Shreyas Iyer's captaincy will be tested.
> The team is fully backing Sanju Samson; now it is up to him to perform.
> There will be pressure on Sanju and Abhishek, as if they fail, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi may get a chance.
> There are expected to be very few changes in the playing XI.
> Varun Chakravarthy has joined the team and is expected to feature in the playing XI.
> All eyes will be on Tilak Varma, Sanju Samson, and Abhishek Sharma; if they fail, a spot may open up for Vaibhav Sooryavanshi.
